# PERF-201 negative: a community CORS package is used
lang: go
file: PERF-201-safe.go
variant: framework
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/rs/cors"
)

func Init() http.Handler {
	c := cors.New(cors.Options{
		AllowedOrigins: []string{"*"},
	})
	return c.Handler(http.DefaultServeMux)
}
